findings.description: `type` is a required attribute (必須) of the scriptタグ but is absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source table row: `type(必須) | XHTMLのtype属性`

findings.description: `errorCss` attribute and its default value `nablarch_error` are absent from hints. `infoCss` and `warnCss` are included, making the omission of the parallel `errorCss` entry inconsistent.
findings.source_evidence: Source table row: `errorCss | エラーレベルのメッセージに使用するCSSクラス名。デフォルトは"nablarch_error"`
